collectedPage.title: The AI workspace that works for you. | Notion
collectedPage.content: Meet the night shift.Notion agents keep work moving 24/7. They capture knowledge, answer questions, and push projects forward—all while you sleep. [Get Notion free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2F&tid=8f65f8fe1bc740b58b95bfefeb70a954) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) PlayTrusted by 98% of the Forbes Cloud 100 Keep work moving 24/7. [Custom AgentsAutomate repetitive work for your team.→](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Q&A agentsAnswers questions instantly using knowledge you already have.Task routing agentsAssigns, prioritizes, and routes tasks on its own.Reporting agentsSummarizes, writes, and sends reports for you.Create your ownMake a Custom Agent for any work that repeats.Q&A agentsAnswers questions instantly using knowledge you already have.See what Custom Agents can do Triage product feedback→ Resolve support tickets in Slack→ Respond to security alerts faster→ Automate weekly reporting→ Create your own Custom Agent→Ask your on-demand assistants. Notion AgentYou assign the tasks. Notion Agent does the work.→ Enterprise SearchOne search for everything.→ AI Meeting NotesPerfect notes, every time.→Bring all your work together. DocsSimple and powerful.→ Knowledge BaseOne source of truth for teams and agents.→ ProjectsLess tracking. More progress.→Your AI everything app.Trusted by teams that ship.There’s power in a single platform where you can do all your work. Notion is that single place. collectedPage.title: Meet your AI team | Notion
collectedPage.content: Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Answer questions, prioritize tasks, and write reports—all while you sleep. [Try for free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) Trusted by teams atAgentsEnterprise searchAI Meeting NotesAdmin controlsEnterprise Search 16:10Admin Controls 16:10If it’s something that’s repetitive, we have a Notion Agent for it.Ben LevickHead of AI & Operations, RampAI that works where your team works. Try for free.Free$0per member / monthFor individuals to organize personal projects and life. [Sign up](https://www.notion.com/signup) Includes:Trial AI capabilities like generating docs, or autofilling databasesTrial of Notion AICapture, organize, and act on responses right inside Notion.Basic formsPublish a Notion page to the webBasic sitesConnect multiple Calendars to manage work and time together.Notion CalendarConnect your Gmail for an AI-powered, personalized inbox.Notion Mail (Syncs with Gmail)Organize hundreds or thousands of items in one place, like projects or tasksDatabases including subtasks, dependencies, custom properties and moreBusinessRecommended$20per member / monthFor growing businesses to streamline teamwork. [Get started](https://www.notion.com/signup?target=plans) Everything in Plus, and:Does work for you. Completes complex, multi-step tasks using context from Notion, your connected apps, and the web.Notion AgentAI agents handle repetitive tasks autonomously, so your team doesn’t have to. Free to try, then $10 per 1,000 credits.Custom AgentsAutomate your meeting notes and follow-ups, no bot neededAI Meeting NotesSearch across connected apps like Slack, Github & moreEnterprise SearchBetaManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML SSOCollaborate in Notion databases without giving access to the entire database. Limit access to rows where the collaborator is assigned.Granular database permissionsAdd a verified badge to pages that are up to date. Appears in search results and AI citations.Verify any pageCreate teamspaces that can’t be seen or discovered by anyone except those you add. Great for sensitive information like company planning or performance reviews.Private teamspacesVerify ownership of an email domain to access advanced security features including single-sign on.Domain verificationConnect to GitHub, Asana & morePremium connectionsCustom Agents automate work that repeats.Set them up once, and the entire team benefits. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) All our teams, docs, and workflows are in Notion, and it’s listening to Slack. When your agents have full context across the company, that’s what makes them useful.Morgane PalomaresVP of Marketing, BraintrustYour Notion Agent can build, edit, and take action.Anything you can do in Notion, your Notion Agent can do for you. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Enterprise Search finds answers across all your apps.Search across Slack, Google Drive, GitHub & more—in seconds. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/enterprise-search) AI Meeting Notes gives your team perfect meeting memory.Capture every detail and actionable summaries, right where you work. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes) Designed for teams.Usage & analytics dashboardsTrack Notion credit usage, view detailed analytics and ROI insights.Custom permissionsYou’re in control of what Notion AI can see and do.Model agnosticSwitch any workflow to a different model or provider, without losing any context.Governance tools & controlsGet a bird’s eye view of AI actions across your workspace, with controls for who can do what.Trusted by enterprise. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.

Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.

results.title: Meet your AI team | Notion
results.content: Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Answer questions, prioritize tasks, and write reports—all while you sleep. [Try for free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) Trusted by teams atAgentsEnterprise searchAI Meeting NotesAdmin controlsEnterprise Search 16:10Admin Controls 16:10If it’s something that’s repetitive, we have a Notion Agent for it.Ben LevickHead of AI & Operations, RampAI that works where your team works. Try for free.Free$0per member / monthFor individuals to organize personal projects and life. [Sign up](https://www.notion.com/signup) Includes:Trial AI capabilities like generating docs, or autofilling databasesTrial of Notion AICapture, organize, and act on responses right inside Notion.Basic formsPublish a Notion page to the webBasic sitesConnect multiple Calendars to manage work and time together.Notion CalendarConnect your Gmail for an AI-powered, personalized inbox.Notion Mail (Syncs with Gmail)Organize hundreds or thousands of items in one place, like projects or tasksDatabases including subtasks, dependencies, custom properties and moreBusinessRecommended$20per member / monthFor growing businesses to streamline teamwork. [Get started](https://www.notion.com/signup?target=plans) Everything in Plus, and:Does work for you. Completes complex, multi-step tasks using context from Notion, your connected apps, and the web.Notion AgentAI agents handle repetitive tasks autonomously, so your team doesn’t have to. Free to try, then $10 per 1,000 credits.Custom AgentsAutomate your meeting notes and follow-ups, no bot neededAI Meeting NotesSearch across connected apps like Slack, Github & moreEnterprise SearchBetaManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML SSOCollaborate in Notion databases without giving access to the entire database. Limit access to rows where the collaborator is assigned.Granular database permissionsAdd a verified badge to pages that are up to date. Appears in search results and AI citations.Verify any pageCreate teamspaces that can’t be seen or discovered by anyone except those you add. Great for sensitive information like company planning or performance reviews.Private teamspacesVerify ownership of an email domain to access advanced security features including single-sign on.Domain verificationConnect to GitHub, Asana & morePremium connectionsCustom Agents automate work that repeats.Set them up once, and the entire team benefits. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) All our teams, docs, and workflows are in Notion, and it’s listening to Slack. When your agents have full context across the company, that’s what makes them useful.Morgane PalomaresVP of Marketing, BraintrustYour Notion Agent can build, edit, and take action.Anything you can do in Notion, your Notion Agent can do for you. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Enterprise Search finds answers across all your apps.Search across Slack, Google Drive, GitHub & more—in seconds. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/enterprise-search) AI Meeting Notes gives your team perfect meeting memory.Capture every detail and actionable summaries, right where you work. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai-meeting-notes) Designed for teams.Usage & analytics dashboardsTrack Notion credit usage, view detailed analytics and ROI insights.Custom permissionsYou’re in control of what Notion AI can see and do.Model agnosticSwitch any workflow to a different model or provider, without losing any context.Governance tools & controlsGet a bird’s eye view of AI actions across your workspace, with controls for who can do what.Trusted by enterprise. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.

No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"documentVersion":1,"status":"READY","failureReason":null,"collectedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,648978800],"createdAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,672076500],"updatedAt":[2026,6,20,14,19,36,759773500]},"retrievalChunks":[{"id":9302,"taskId":50,"knowledgeDocumentId":49,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","retrievalScope":"TASK","scopeRefKey":"50","knowledgeDomainKey":null,"chunkKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001#CHUNK-001","chunkIndex":0,"startOffset":0,"endOffset":600,"sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","documentVersion":1,"content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. your AI team | Notion","content":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. Free to try, then $10 per 1,000 credits.Custom AgentsAutomate your meeting notes and follow-ups, no bot neededAI Meeting NotesSearch across connected apps like Slack, Github & moreEnterprise SearchBetaManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML SSOCollaborate in Notion databases without giving access to the entire database. When your agents have full context across the company, that’s what makes them useful.Morgane PalomaresVP of Marketing, BraintrustYour Notion Agent can build, edit, and take action.Anything you can do in Notion, your Notion Agent can do for you. [Learn more →](https://www.notion.com/product/agents) Enterprise Search finds answers across all your apps.Search across Slack, Google Drive, GitHub & more—in seconds. [Learn more about security practices →](https://www.notion.so/help/notion-ai-security-practices?_gl=1*p1njrn*_gcl_au*MTcxMjUyNjE2LjE3NDQ4MTY4MzM.*_ga*MTgyNjkyNzg0MS4xNzI5MTA5MzMx*_ga_9ZJ8CB186L*MTc0NjA0NDM5Mi4yMzcuMS4xNzQ2MDQ1Njk5LjUwLjAuMA..) No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. During this time, teams can explore how Custom Agents fit into their workflows, and admins can track their team's patterns in the [Notion credits dashboard](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) to understand usage and estimate future credit needs.Admins (Business and Enterprise plans) can manage who can create Custom Agents and disable Agents anytime to guide controlled rollouts.Starting May 4, 2026:Custom Agents will start using Notion credits when they run. Admins can purchase additional credits, and if credits are insufficient, agents will automatically pause until more are added.How can I learn more about Notion AI?Visit our [Help Center](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs) and [Notion Academy](https://academy.notion.com/?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fai&tid=323f2fae1b4445c2ac65319545bb3224) for guides, examples, and best practices for using Notion AI and Custom Agents.","sourceUrls":["https://notion.so/product/ai"],"issueFlags":[],"qualitySignals":["MAIN_CONTENT_READY","NO_STRUCTURED_BLOCKS"],"structuredBlocks":[],"structuredPayload":{},"quality":{"qualityScore":0.92,"failureKind":null,"durationMillis":24571}}],"knowledgeDocument":{"id":49,"taskId":50,"competitorName":"Notion AI","evidenceId":"T0050-COLLECT_SOURCES_01_01-001","documentKey":"TASK-50-T0050-COLLECT-SOURCES-01-01-001","knowledgeScope":"TASK","knowledgeDomainId":null,"knowledgeDomainKey":null,"sourceType":"OFFICIAL","sourceCategory":"AI_DISCOVERED","discoveryMethod":"DIRECT_LOCATOR","sourceDomain":"notion.so","sourceLifecycle":"ACTIVE","trustLevel":"DISCOVERED","connectorKey":null,"title":"Meet your AI team | Notion","url":"https://notion.so/product/ai","snippet":"Meet your 24/7 AI teamInfinite minds, built for teamwork. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. No training on your dataWe have contractual agreements with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models.SOC 2 Type 2 & ISO 27001Notion is committed to the highest requirements of information security.GDPR & CCPAWe have mapped our privacy program to the GDPR and other global privacy regulations.Secure encryptionWhen you use Notion AI, your data is encrypted in-transit using TLS 1.2 or greater.Zero data retention for EnterpriseNo data is stored with LLM providers. 30 day retention for non-Enterprise. [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) HIPAA compliant for EnterpriseNotion AI enables HIPAA compliance by utilizing LLM provider’s zero-retention APIs and allows for the processing of protected health information (PHI). [Contact sales→](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) See what Notion AI can do. [Explore all use cases →](https://www.notion.com/product/ai/use-cases) Onboard a new hire → Go from brainstorm to roadmap → Automate weekly reporting → Triage product feedback → Resolve support tickets in Slack → Respond to security alerts faster → Questions & answersWhat can Notion AI help me do?Notion AI is your built-in teammate inside Notion, working directly in your pages, docs, tasks, and databases so you can move faster without switching tools. Using context from your workspace and connected apps (when enabled), it helps you turn ideas into finished work all in one place.Here’s what you can do with Notion AI:Chat with [Notion Agent](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#personal-agent) to take on entire tasks, using context from your workspace and connected apps to create and edit pages and databases.Use [Custom Agents](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) to automate recurring work for your team, like answering questions on Slack, routing tasks, and sharing project updates .Search across your workspace and connected apps like Slack and Google Drive with [Enterprise Search](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#enterprise-search) and [Notion AI Connectors](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-connectors) ,, so you can find answers without jumping between tools.Capture meetings with [AI Meeting Notes](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#ai-meeting-notes-(beta)) , which transcribe conversations, summarize key points, and surface insights automatically.Dive deep on a topic with [Research Mode](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#research-mode) to generate detailed reports and summaries.Improve writing or generate drafts with [AI blocks](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-inline) directly in your pages.Create [databases](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-faqs#notion-ai-for-databases) , auto-populate properties with [Autofill](https://www.notion.com/help/autofill#autofill) , and write formulas for smarter workflows and automations.To ensure optimal performance and fair use across all Notion AI users, your access to AI features can be temporarily reduced depending on your usage.What are Custom Agents?Custom Agents automate recurring work for your entire team. Set a trigger or schedule, and the agent handles it from there—24/7, whether you're online or not. One person builds it, and the whole team benefits. [Learn more.](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent) How does Notion AI use my data?We follow our standard [data protection practices](https://www.notion.com/security) to keep your data encrypted and private. Notion AI will not use your data to train our models unless you opt in to a request to share your data.Any information used to power Notion AI will be shared with AI subprocessors for the sole purpose of providing you with the Notion AI features. We specifically have contractual agreements in place with our AI subprocessors that prohibit the use of customer data to train their models. [Learn more about Notion AI security and privacy practices here.](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-ai-security-practices) How much does Notion AI cost? (and what are Notion credits)?Notion AI is included with Notion’s Business and Enterprise plans, with core features like Notion Agent, AI Meeting Notes, and Enterprise Search. Workspaces on other plans get a limited amount of trial usage to try it out.Why are Custom Agents priced differently?Custom Agents can run on schedules or triggers and complete multi-step work across your workspace and connected tools. Admins can purchase Notion credits as an add-on for Business and Enterprise plans. Notion credits let teams scale that usage up or down based on how much automation they run. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/custom-agent-pricing) .What are Notion credits?Custom Agents run on Notion credits. Notion credits are available as an add-on to Business and Enterprise plans for teams that need always-on automation. Each run uses credits based on how much work the agent does, and admins can track usage in the Notion credits dashboard. [Learn more](https://www.notion.com/help/notion-credits-dashboard) .When do Notion credits go into effect?Now through May 3, 2026:Custom Agents are free to use on Business and Enterprise plans, including Business trials. collectedPage.content: DocsThe next gen of notes & docsSimple. Powerful. Beautiful. Communicate more efficiently with Notion's flexible building blocks. [Get Notion free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fdocs&tid=4c184a4dc42c43308e01eaab0edd8fec) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) Meeting NotesConnect people & projects with updates & action items. Updates automatically.ChartsAdd live charts to any doc.And 50+ more content typesLike a bottomless box of building blocks.Store docs where people can easily find themEvery team’s files, at a glanceNotion’s sidebar keeps your workspace organized no matter how fast you grow.Not only do our streamlined workflows in Notion save us time, they also make it easier to stay up to date on task details and progress.Taku WakasugiToyota Frontier Research Center, ToyotaGet your team on the same page, literallyCollaborate or co-edit togetherAllow others to comment or suggest edits. Just type the @ key to get their attention.Comments keep the ball rolling asyncA consolidated view of feedback makes it easy to iterate, even across time zones.We can quickly build out a meeting agenda for a large group of people and still make it interactive and fun.Scott StephensDesign Operations Manager, Kin + CartaFor PMs, designers, engineers, and everyone in betweenProduct managersConnect the roadmap to goals, and keep folks aligned on what’s shipping and when. results.title: Docs | Notion
results.content: DocsThe next gen of notes & docsSimple. Powerful. Beautiful. Communicate more efficiently with Notion's flexible building blocks. [Get Notion free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fdocs&tid=4c184a4dc42c43308e01eaab0edd8fec) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales) Meeting NotesConnect people & projects with updates & action items. [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/meeting-notes) [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/meeting-notes) Design SystemAll your company's design assets in one place. [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/design-system) [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/design-system) Project requirementsA customizable PRD that fits any type of project. [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/prd) [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/prd) Pitch deckTell your company's story in a dynamic way. [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/pitch-deck) [Duplicate Template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/pitch-deck) AI meeting notesAI meeting notesAI meeting notesAI meeting notesGo way beyond text & bullet pointsCode snippetsNative syntax highlighting for dozens of languages.TogglesCollapsible sections make your docs easy to read.Images & videosEmbed directly from Loom & YouTube, or upload your own.Table of contentsClick to jump to a section. Updates automatically.ChartsAdd live charts to any doc.And 50+ more content typesLike a bottomless box of building blocks.Store docs where people can easily find themEvery team’s files, at a glanceNotion’s sidebar keeps your workspace organized no matter how fast you grow.Not only do our streamlined workflows in Notion save us time, they also make it easier to stay up to date on task details and progress.Taku WakasugiToyota Frontier Research Center, ToyotaGet your team on the same page, literallyCollaborate or co-edit togetherAllow others to comment or suggest edits. Just type the @ key to get their attention.Comments keep the ball rolling asyncA consolidated view of feedback makes it easy to iterate, even across time zones.We can quickly build out a meeting agenda for a large group of people and still make it interactive and fun.Scott StephensDesign Operations Manager, Kin + CartaFor PMs, designers, engineers, and everyone in betweenProduct managersConnect the roadmap to goals, and keep folks aligned on what’s shipping and when. [See how PMs use Notion→](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-product) DesignersMove review rounds forward, prioritize requests, and hit all your creative deadlines. [See how designers use Notion→](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-design) EngineersShip features faster with sprints, code guidelines, bug fixes & more, all in one place. [See how engineers use Notion→](https://www.notion.com/product/notion-for-engineering) Wikis and Projects included, for the same priceWikisIt's hard to move fast with a clunky & disorganized workspace. Centralize all your knowledge in Notion instead.ProjectsManage any type of project, no matter the team or size.Info from Figma, GitHub & more. Easy to share, easy to see. [See all connections](https://www.notion.com/integrations/all) FigmaAlways share the most updated designs with your team. [Try now→](https://www.notion.com/integrations/figma) AmplitudeTrack release metrics, experiment results, and more. [Try now→](https://www.notion.com/integrations/amplitude) GithubBring pull requests, issues, and even repos directly into Notion. [Try now→](https://www.notion.com/integrations/github) SlackSimply paste a link to see the full message without switching tools. [Try now→](https://www.notion.com/integrations/slack) JiraSee bug updates, or convert an entire project into a database. [Try now→](https://www.notion.com/integrations/jira) Browse all connections [Go to the gallery→](https://www.notion.com/integrations/all) Choose a template to get started [Explore templates](https://www.notion.com/templates) Mixpanel’s daily standup & tasks [Try template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/mixpanels-daily-standup-and-tasks) Notion's product requirement doc [Try template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/product-requirement-document-prd) Netflix's branding framework [Try template→](https://www.notion.com/templates/netflix-branding-framework) Write your next doc in NotionPlay around with it first. Pay and add your team later. [Get Notion free](https://www.notion.com/signup?from=marketing&pathname=%2Fproduct%2Fdocs&tid=4c184a4dc42c43308e01eaab0edd8fec) [Request a demo](https://www.notion.com/contact-sales)

collectedPage.title: Notion Pricing Plans: Free, Plus, Business, & Enterprise.
collectedPage.content: One tool to run your company.Trusted by teams atSelect payment mode:Pay monthlyPay yearlySave up to 20% with yearlyPrice inUSDEssentials for staying organized.Free$0per member / monthFor individuals to organize personal projects and life. [Sign up](https://www.notion.com/signup) Includes:Trial AI capabilities like generating docs, or autofilling databasesTrial of Notion AICapture, organize, and act on responses right inside Notion.Basic formsPublish a Notion page to the webBasic sitesConnect multiple Calendars to manage work and time together.Notion CalendarConnect your Gmail for an AI-powered, personalized inbox.Notion Mail (Syncs with Gmail)Organize hundreds or thousands of items in one place, like projects or tasksDatabases including subtasks, dependencies, custom properties and morePlus$10per member / monthFor small teams and professionals to work together. [Get started](https://www.notion.com/signup?target=plans) Everything in Free, and:Trial AI capabilities like generating docs, or autofilling databasesTrial of Notion AIRemove Notion branding from public formsCustom formsCustomize your top header, choose a light or dark theme, add a custom favicon, and integrate with Google Analytics.Custom sitesVisualize data from databases in different ways (e.g. donut, bar, and line charts).Unlimited chartsBlocks are pieces of content you add to a page (e.g. to-do checkboxes, paragraphs, bullet points, etc.).Unlimited collaborative blocksA per file size limit may apply to any file that you upload to a Notion page or database.Unlimited file uploadsConnect to some tools like Slack & Google DriveBasic connectionsThe AI workspace for work that matters.BusinessRecommended$20per member / monthFor growing businesses to streamline teamwork. [Get started](https://www.notion.com/signup?target=plans) Everything in Plus, and:Does work for you. Completes complex, multi-step tasks using context from Notion, your connected apps, and the web.Notion AgentAutomate your meeting notes and follow-ups, no bot neededAI Meeting NotesSearch across connected apps like Slack, Github & moreEnterprise SearchBetaManage employee access at scale with secure single sign-on.SAML SSOCollaborate in Notion databases without giving access to the entire database. Limit access to rows where the collaborator is assigned.Granular database permissionsAdd a verified badge to pages that are up to date.
